urdu transliteration text:
Yun utthe matame sarwar mein azadaar ke haathThe Azadaars of Imam Husain raise their hands in maatamEnglish Transliteration
@HujjatELC

Yun uthe matame sarwar mein azadaar ke haathPehle takbeer utthe jaise ke deen daar ke haath
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
The Azadaars of Imam Husain raise their hands in maatam,
Just as the worshippers raise their hands in the Takbiratul Ihram (of salat)
remembered the sword in Yadullah’s hands (Imam Ali a.s.)

urdu transliteration text:
Roke bacho ne kahaa ab na milega paanikat gaye nehr pe abbas alamdar ke haath
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
The children cried bitterly and said, now we will not get any water,
The hands of Abbas Alamdar have been severed at the River Furat
Where is my Asghar, the mother trembled and asked,

urdu transliteration text:
Ghirne par unton se haatho ka sahaara kyalebhande ghardan se laeeone the beemar ke haath
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
How would Imam Sajjad (a.s.) use his hands when he fell from the camel,
The cursed people had tied his hands behind his neck

urdu transliteration text:
Fatema aagyengi mehshar me shifaat keliyeLeke aaghosh me abbas alamdar ke haath
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
Sayyida Fatima (s.a.) will come to intercede on the Day of Judgement,
she will be carrying the hands of Abbas in her cloak
